page: Microsoft Azure EC8ads_v6 is an ECadsv6-family virtual machine configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an AMD processor. The system runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and features 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type includes 307 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage options. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses and does not feature dedicated GPU hardware.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads. The combination of dedicated CPU allocation, high memory density, and local storage makes it suitable for database hosting, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring significant RAM without requiring GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure EC8ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine within the ECadsv6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The instance includes 307 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource profile is optimized for memory-intensive operations, making it highly suitable for database management systems, in-memory data structures, and enterprise applications that require a substantial memory footprint relative to compute resources.
